raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-affirmation / declarative intention-setting that models desired relational stances",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker possesses unilateral agency to enact mutuality, non-collapse, and authentic presence",
    "Previous patterns (overgiving, collapse) were safety strategies rather than fixed traits",
    "Mutuality, non-collapse, and co-regulation are both attainable and preferable states",
    "These four statements form a coherent, non-contradictory set of relational principles"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent; all clauses reinforce a single theme of balanced, non-self-erasing relational presence without internal contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statements function as repeated personal reminders within a supportive therapeutic or self-reflective context and the user has sufficient self-awareness and relational safety to practice the described behaviors",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statements are treated as objective psychological facts, universal mandates, or sufficient substitutes for actual skill-building, boundary practice, or external relational change"
}
